creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
>  > Was any progress ever made on this one?  Does it still happen
>  > with the current version of the port?
 
>  No Progress. The ports/ja-mimekit-1.8 of FreeBSD 4.10-RELEASE produces
>  a blank line in header.
 
I must apologize since I have been able to spend very little time on
this.  I've attempted the following, but neither worked.

1. Upgrade the port to use the latest source in the latest
   distribution of the Delegate.

2. Looked into the current source and see where the problem is.

Now, is this a FreeBSD specific problem?  Or does this problem occur
in other platforms as well?  If latter, I would not consider this as a
problem with the port.  Of course, if a working patch is provided, I
am happy to include it in the port.

Max
